message:
Merge PR #2185: fix(refinery): make stale-claim thresholds and MaxRetryCount config-driven (ZFC)

Move hardcoded stale-claim warning/critical thresholds and MaxRetryCount
into MergeQueueConfig with sensible defaults. Config-driven per ZFC principles.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2185
Author: DreadPirateRobertz
